Glue Card Party

pages.raw_text:
The members of the Arts and
Crafts department of the Woman's
club are preparing for a very en-
joyable evening February 7, in the
assembly room of the chamber of
commerce. Both whist and five
hundred will be played, and four
beautiful prizes for the occasion are
being painted by some of the artists
of the department. The score cards
are being painted by members of
the department. A well selected
musical program will be rendered
while lunch is served.


This card party is given for the
purpose of furnishing a studio with
a kiln for burning china, and sup
plies, in order that the members of
the Woman's club may study arts
and crafts with but little cost to
individuals. Mrs. j, X. Cassn is
vice chairman of the department
and Mrs. O. b. Settlers and Mrs j.
J. Marischal committee on arrange
mentS. ~"


The china painting class has an
enrolment of so members; the wa
ter color class, 26, and the needle
work class has an enrolment OF 10.
